sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.59b (beta): Zero-result pages that qualify for Extra Time now say so — the results table's note on an S:0 A:0 page that is an Extra-Time candidate (and did not already run a billed Extra-Time continuation) changes from the generic 'Please scan again' to 'Needs Extra Time — rescan with “Rescan ET Candidates”', directing you to the existing Rescan ET Candidates button. Display-only. Also carries the 1.7.58b fix: the live progress poll and worker status endpoint are uncacheable (Cache-Control: no-store), so a scan can no longer appear stuck at N-1/N until a hard refresh.
